intent.statement: Create a minimal documented construction substrate.

closure.decision: USC substrate is separate from USC app repos.
closure.rationale: Separation of reusable grammar from concrete systems.

tasks.title: Create public substrate skeleton
tasks.transformation: Create docs, protocols, schemas, and examples for reusable USC substrate.
tasks.evidence_requirement: Files exist and describe intended boundaries.
tasks.review_predicate: Repo can be understood as USC substrate rather than app repo or diary.

review_predicates.statement: All public files avoid private operational data.
